title: Eastern Pilaf with Vegetables
description: A flavorful and aromatic eastern-inspired pilaf dish loaded with sautéed vegetables. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: eastern spices
ingredients.notes: Use a blend of ground cumin, coriander, and turmeric.

instructions: Heat 2 tbsp of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add chopped vegetables and cook until tender.
Add eastern spices to the skillet and stir for 1 minute.
Add rinsed xerid to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add cooked pilaf to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add aird and middle to the skillet. Stir to combine.
Optional: Garnish with chopped fresh herbs.
